_comment: TEMPLATE default channel map — placeholder. Copy to config/channel_map.<your-id>.json and edit. One function per motor/channel you control; add more entries to the 'functions' object AND to the layout's 'functions' list in web/layouts.json. Each function maps to a (slot, channel) nibble; values are -7..+7 (0x8 + value).

knob_1._todo: Rename this function, set its real slot/channel, and tune the fields below by driving it.
